body:
On main:

```julia
julia> PartialCellBottom(bottom)
Error showing value of type PartialCellBottom{typeof(bottom), Float64}:
ERROR: MethodError: no method matching Float64(::String)

Closest candidates are:
  Float64(::Int16)
   @ Base float.jl:159
  Float64(::Float16)
   @ Base float.jl:262
  Float64(::UInt128)
   @ Base float.jl:180
  ...

Stacktrace:
  [1] tofloat(x::String)
    @ Printf ~/bin/julia-1.10.8/share/julia/stdlib/v1.10/Printf/src/Printf.jl:482
  [2] fmt
    @ ~/bin/julia-1.10.8/share/julia/stdlib/v1.10/Printf/src/Printf.jl:499 [inlined]
  [3] fmt
    @ ~/bin/julia-1.10.8/share/julia/stdlib/v1.10/Printf/src/Printf.jl:311 [inlined]
  [4] format
    @ ~/bin/julia-1.10.8/share/julia/stdlib/v1.10/Printf/src/Printf.jl:832 [inlined]
  [5] format(::Printf.Format{Base.CodeUnits{UInt8, String}, Tuple{Printf.Spec{Val{'s'}}, Printf.Spec{Val{'f'}}}}, ::String, ::String)
    @ Printf ~/bin/julia-1.10.8/share/julia/stdlib/v1.10/Printf/src/Printf.jl:941
  [6] summary(ib::PartialCellBottom{typeof(bottom), Float64})
    @ Oceananigans.ImmersedBoundaries ~/repos/Oceananigans.jl/src/ImmersedBoundaries/partial_cell_bottom.jl:35
  [7] show(io::IOContext{Base.TTY}, ib::PartialCellBottom{typeof(bottom), Float64})
    @ Oceananigans.ImmersedBoundaries ~/repos/Oceananigans.jl/src/ImmersedBoundaries/partial_cell_bottom.jl:40
  [8] show(io::IOContext{Base.TTY}, ::MIME{Symbol("text/plain")}, x::PartialCellBottom{typeof(bottom), Float64})
    @ Base.Multimedia ./multimedia.jl:47
```

This PR fixes this error.
title: Fix summary for `PartialCellBottom`

body:
This PR implements the improvements discussed in [#4395](https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/issues/4395):

- Tracer conservation is now tested at every time step, rather than only at the end of the simulation.
- Early stopping is triggered if any conservation test fails, reducing unnecessary computation.
- In the tripolar test, the simulation now starts from randomly initialized velocities instead of rest, helping detect conservation issues earlier.
- The tripolar grid has been reduced in size to improve computational efficiency.
- Tests using a uniform vertical coordinate have been removed to reduce overall test runtime.

Closes [#4395](https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/issues/4395).
title: Improve z-star tracer conservation tests
Add CATKE and GPU dycore paper references
